description:
AdGuard is a unique adblock program for Windows that has all the necessary features for the best web experience.

AdGuard is a unique desktop program that has all the necessary features for the best web experience.
The software combines the world's most advanced ad blocker for Windows, a whole privacy protection module, and a parental control tool — all working in any browser or app.
Have you ever noticed how the app crashes even when you have a freshly updated version? Well, notice no more! This hotfix solves that problem. From now on, just pure ad blocking all the way.
